buildCommand: if [ -n "$CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY" ]; then npm run build:vercel; else echo "CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY is not set; running frontend-only Vite build against the configured Convex production URL. This deploy does not push Convex functions."; VITE_CONVEX_URL="${VITE_CONVEX_URL:-https://youthful-sockeye-531.convex.cloud}" npm run build; fi
